scripts.bun:repo:smoke: bun run bun:check:docs-structure && bun run bun:check:api-error-sources && bun run bun:check:canonical-sitewide && bun run bun:check:observability
scripts.bun:repo:quality: bun run bun:check:architecture-guardrails && bun run bun:check:ui-consolidation
scripts.bun:repo:ci: bun run bun:repo:toolchain && bun run bun:repo:smoke && bun run bun:repo:quality
scripts.check:scanner-contracts: npm run lint:scanner-scripts && npm run test:scanner-envelopes
scripts.check:toolchain:contract: bun run check:toolchain:contract:node && bun run check:bun:version && bun run check:bun:lock-sync
scripts.check:bun:compat: bun run check:toolchain:contract && bun run test:bun:runtime && bun run lint -- --help && bun run check:unsafe-patterns -- --no-write
scripts.check:quality:core: npm run check:unsafe-patterns && npm run check:import-boundaries && npm run check:api-input-validation && npm run check:context-health && npm run check:timer-cleanup && npm run check:test-distribution
scripts.check:quality:core:strict: npm run check:unsafe-patterns:strict && npm run check:import-boundaries:strict && npm run check:api-input-validation:strict && npm run check:context-health:strict && npm run check:timer-cleanup:strict && npm run check:test-distribution:strict
scripts.check:quality:extended: npm run check:quality:core && npm run check:api-error-sources && npm run check:route-policies && npm run check:next-route-config-reexports && npm run check:security:static && npm run check:security:authz-matrix && npm run check:api-contract-coverage && npm run check:coverage:high-risk && npm run check:accessibility:component-policies && npm run health:env-contract && npm run health:queue-runtime && npm run health:storage-and-files
scripts.check:quality:extended:strict: npm run check:quality:core:strict && npm run check:api-error-sources:strict && npm run check:route-policies:strict && npm run check:next-route-config-reexports:strict && npm run check:security:static:strict && npm run check:security:authz-matrix:strict && npm run check:api-contract-coverage:strict && npm run check:coverage:high-risk:strict && npm run check:accessibility:component-policies:strict && npm run health:env-contract:strict && npm run health:queue-runtime:strict && npm run health:storage-and-files:strict
scripts.metrics:all: npm run metrics:collect && npm run metrics:hotspots && npm run metrics:guardrails
scripts.perf:ops:fast: npm run observability:check && npm run metrics:critical-paths:check -- --ci && npm run test:critical-flows
scripts.perf:ops:baseline: npm run metrics:collect && npm run metrics:hotspots && npm run observability:check && npm run metrics:critical-paths && npm run test:critical-flows && npm run test:unit:domains
scripts.docs:ai-paths:node-docs:generate: npm run docs:ai-paths:semantic:generate && npm run docs:ai-paths:node-code:generate && npm run docs:ai-paths:node-migration:generate
scripts.docs:ai-paths:node-docs:check: npm run docs:ai-paths:semantic:check && npm run docs:ai-paths:node-code:check && npm run docs:ai-paths:node-migration:check && npm run test:ai-paths:node-migration-parity-evidence
scripts.docs:ai-paths:node-docs:ci: npm run docs:ai-paths:node-docs:verify && npm run docs:ai-paths:tooltip:check
scripts.ai-paths:check:canonical: node scripts/ai-paths/check-canonical.mjs && node --import tsx scripts/ai-paths/check-portable-schema-diff.ts --strict && npm run docs:ai-paths:node-docs:check && npm run docs:ai-paths:tooltip:check && npm run docs:ai-paths:kernel-transition:check && npm run docs:ai-paths:improvements-roadmap:check
scripts.test:kangur:ai-tutor:selection-handoff:e: node scripts/testing/run-playwright-suite.mjs e2e/features/kangur/kangur-ai-tutor.spec.ts --grep "does not reopen the tutor automatically when a new lesson fragment is selected after dismissing selection guidance"
scripts.test:ai-paths:trigger-queue:integration: npm run test:ai-paths:trigger-queue:unit && npm run test:ai-paths:trigger-queue:e2e
scripts.test:ai-paths:rollout:gate: npm run test:ai-paths:runtime-kernel:integration && npm run test:ai-paths:trigger-queue:integration
scripts.test:accessibility:gate: npm run check:accessibility:component-policies:strict && npm run test:accessibility-smoke:strict && npm run test:accessibility:route-crawl:strict
scripts.test:ci: npm run docs:structure:check && npm run lint:scanner-scripts && npm run test:scanner-envelopes && npm run canonical:check:sitewide && npm run ai-paths:check:canonical && npm run observability:check && npm run check:next-route-config-reexports:strict && npm run test:unit && npm run test:ai-paths:signal-flow-regression && npm run test:ai-paths:runtime-kernel:integration && npm run test:integration:mongo
scripts.lint:tests: ESLINT_INCLUDE_TESTS=1 eslint "src/app/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}" --cache --cache-location .eslintcache-tests --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern && ESLINT_INCLUDE_TESTS=1 eslint "src/features/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}" --cache --cache-location .eslintcache-tests --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern && ESLINT_INCLUDE_TESTS=1 eslint "src/shared/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}" --cache --cache-location .eslintcache-tests --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern && ESLINT_INCLUDE_TESTS=1 eslint "e2e/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}" --cache --cache-location .eslintcache-tests --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.lint:fix:tests: ESLINT_INCLUDE_TESTS=1 eslint "src/app/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}" --fix --cache --cache-location .eslintcache-tests --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern && ESLINT_INCLUDE_TESTS=1 eslint "src/features/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}" --fix --cache --cache-location .eslintcache-tests --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern && ESLINT_INCLUDE_TESTS=1 eslint "src/shared/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}" --fix --cache --cache-location .eslintcache-tests --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern && ESLINT_INCLUDE_TESTS=1 eslint "e2e/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}" --fix --cache --cache-location .eslintcache-tests --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.agentic:finalize: npm run agentic:execute -- --include-validation --validation-risk-threshold medium --report artifacts/agent-final-report.json && npm run agentic:collect-artifacts
scripts.agentic:finalize:force: npm run agentic:execute -- --include-validation --force-validation --validation-risk-threshold low --report artifacts/agent-final-report.json && npm run agentic:collect-artifacts
